title: ouratea ilicifolia var. savannarum
intro: Ouratea ilicifolia var. savannarum, a tropical plant native to the savannas and forests of Central and South America, is also known as the Ouratea or Savanna Ouratea, belonging to the family Ochnaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Ouratea ilicifolia var. savannarum include its ability to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions in folk medicine.
